name: Income Tax Forgiveness for Deceased Armed Forces Members

eligibility.description: Applies to members of the U.S. Armed Forces who die while serving in a combat zone or as a result of wounds, disease, or injury incurred while so serving.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Forgives federal income tax liability for the year of death and certain prior years for members of the Armed Forces who die in active service in a combat zone or from combat-related injuries.
